Conclusion.html.en: The last section of this survey references your earlier responses to determine how {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP developed over time and what factors may have played a role in the LP/GOLPP progression.

ConclusionsPanelLifeStatusTrueText.html.en: NOTE: These questions ask about the last station of {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP journey before {cvGenderSubjectPronoun} crossed over the Rainbow Bridge. If it's too painful to revisit this stage of {CmpnName}'s life, it might be best to discontinue the survey and return to it later.
